raw_consumer_statement:
I have had a standard Premium account on XXXX for quite a while. XXXX charges a few dollars per month for this account. On XXXX an XXXX charge for {$390.00} showed up on my Citi CC account. I did not authorize this charge. 

XXXX charged me for an upgraded Premium Plus account which I had never signed up for or requested. XXXX has never responded to any of my inquiries with them. 

I disputed this {$390.00} charge with Citi Mastercard on XXXX. Citi finally responded to my Dispute on XXXX and claimed that there was nothing that they could do because XXXX has a no refund policy. 

I have twice re-opened my Dispute of the charge with Citi Mastercard and both times they have come back and said that my Dispute was denied because of the XXXX no refund policy. I have called Citi multiple times regarding this dispute but the only official responses are Citi 's denial of the Dispute due to XXXX no refund policies. 

I am attaching several files that document this process.
